prompt: Logo wordmark on transparent background with NO background color at all. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. All text is medium gray (#8A8A8A) except the period dot at the end which is bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same font for 'MM' and 'AGENCY' — no mixing. Wide rectangular letterforms, thick strokes, sharp corners. This is the subtle navbar version. No icon, no symbol. Pure typography. Vector quality, flat design. PNG with alpha transparency, no background whatsoever.
negative_prompt: background color, solid background, black background, white background, icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, different fonts, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
